LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.label: Caravan Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.description: A double-barreled, break-action shotgun popular with caravan guards and traders. Its simple design makes it easy to repair and maintain, but it suffers from a slow reload and limited range
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.label: Hunting Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.description: A pump-action shotgun designed for hunting game. Favored for its rugged construction, high capacity, and reliability in the harshest wasteland conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.label: Combat Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.description: The Combat Shotgun is a semi-automatic, magazine-fed shotgun chambered for 12 gauge shells. Designed for military and law enforcement, it offers a high rate of fire and reliability in close-quarters combat, making it a favorite among wasteland enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.label: Riot Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.description: This pre-War, semi-automatic combat shotgun was designed for law enforcement and military use. Its high rate of fire and large magazine make it devastating in close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.label: Sawn-Off Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.description: A double-barreled shotgun with the barrels and stock cut down for easier concealment. Extremely deadly at point-blank range, but wildly inaccurate and short-ranged.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.label: Lever-Action Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.description: A classic lever-action shotgun, prized for its fast cycling and reliability. Popular among ranchers and lawmen, it delivers solid stopping power and can be fired rapidly in skilled hands.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.label: Single Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.description: A simple, single-barrel break-action shotgun. Cheap to produce and easy to maintain, but slow to reload and limited to one shot at a time.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.label: Citykiller Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.description: The Citykiller is a high-capacity, semi-automatic shotgun designed for urban combat. Its rapid fire and large magazine make it devastating in close quarters.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.label: Combat Shotgun MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.description: An advanced version of the Combat Shotgun, featuring improved reliability, accuracy, and rate of fire. Favored by elite military units and wasteland enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.label: Jackhammer Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.description: The Jackhammer is a fully automatic, drum-fed shotgun capable of unleashing a torrent of shells in seconds. Rare and highly prized, it is a force to be reckoned with in any firefight.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.1.label: barrel
